# GLKVertexAttrib.position

**Case**

This index is used to provide the vertex position to a shader.

## Declaration

```swift
case position
```

## Constants

- **GLKVertexAttrib.normal**: This index is used to provide the vertex normal to a shader.
- **GLKVertexAttrib.color**: This index is used to provide the vertex color to a shader.
- **GLKVertexAttrib.texCoord0**: This index is used to provide a set of texture coordinates to a shader.
- **GLKVertexAttrib.texCoord1**: This index is used to provide the second set of texture coordinates to a shader.
